sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112729" key="fuso/baqron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῡσό-βαθρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φῦσα</etym>) <sense id="n112729.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">frame</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stand for bellows,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
